title: CrewAI Orchestrator
description: Multi-agent orchestrator using CrewAI hierarchical process.
Fans out to connected CrewAI sub-agent nodes, assembles a Crew, and synthesizes their outputs.
Can be invoked as a tool (`<nodeId>.run_agent`) for nested orchestration.

llm.description: LLM used by the orchestrator manager agent

tool.description: Optional direct tools available to the orchestrator manager

instructions.title: Instructions
instructions.description: Additional instructions to guide the orchestrator's delegation strategy.
